headline: Risk-on holds; TSM/GEV/RKLB desk takes live — RKLB/IRDM M&A ripples not fully priced

market_state.line: SPY +0.48% above 50d, QQQ +1.26%, VXX stress 0.94 — tape is constructive; momentum entries supported at full/half size.

actions.line: Clean momentum setup, full size — risk-on regime, all three desk agents aligned.
Signal + risk agree, half size — research neutral keeps it off full.
Quarter size only — signal flags late/weak entry, but research + risk lean in on IRDM M&A catalyst.

watch.line: RKLB acquiring IRDM in ~$8B deal; arb spread live, capped at deal price absent competing bid — long below deal price, not above.
Closest LEO satcom pure-play; IRDM takeout sets comp multiple, elevates GSAT as next strategic target for launcher or hyperscaler.
Medium-confidence re-rate — market pricing vertically integrated launch+satcom as the winning model; potential consolidation target.
+6.5% on new drone contract win; space/defense complex momentum reinforces sector bid.
+24.5% on low rel-vol (0.43) and overbought flag — move looks thin, watch for fade.

changed: Desk rotated entirely: FRSH, CMCSA, KHC dropped; TSM, GEV, RKLB are new takes.
Space complex leadership shifted — prior scan had IRDM/VSAT/ASTS as movers; now RKLB M&A deal is the catalyst driving ripples into IRDM/GSAT/ASTS.
VSAT still in top movers (+11.7%) but no longer the headline name.
caveats: RTH scan as of 10:26 ET 2026-06-30; prices and levels are point-in-time and may have moved — verify before entry.
RKLB/IRDM M&A ripple calls carry execution risk: deal terms, arb spread, and competing-bid probability are unconfirmed from this scan data alone.
